articles.title: Scotland's elimination from World Cup confirmed
articles.description: Scotland are out of the 2026 World Cup as they are unable to finish the group stage as one of the eight best third-placed teams.

articles.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
articles.description: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.

articles.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
articles.description: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

articles.title: US conducts retaliatory strikes on Iran after second shipping attack
articles.description: The US said it had hit multiple targets "in direct response to continued Iranian aggression against commercial shipping".
